title: BitWriter write(): network bit order comment may be misleading
description: In rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs BitWriter::write(), the comment says 'Reverse order: network bit order is MSB-first but we index from LSB'. This comment is confusing - the code iterates (0..nbits).rev() which processes bits from MSB to LSB, which IS the correct network order. The comment suggests there's a reversal happening but the iteration is actually correct for MSB-first transmission. Consider clarifying the comment.
close_reason: Clarified BitWriter::write() comment to accurately explain MSB-first iteration
